blocks.input:
{"content":"# Claw Code Mobile
**AI coding agent in your pocket.** Chat with an AI that can execute code, edit files, and manage projects on your remote VPS — all from your iPhone.
--- ## Features - **Streaming chat** — Watch AI responses appear word-by-word in real-time - **Live tool tracking** — See every action the agent takes as it works (file edits, terminal commands, searches) - **Permission prompts** — Approve or deny dangerous operations inline before the agent proceeds - **Terminal drawer** — Pull-up bottom sheet with live terminal output and command input - **Model queue with fallback** — Configure multiple AI models (Claude, OpenRouter, local) that auto-fallback if one fails - **Auto-compact** — Automatically summarizes conversation context when the window fills up - **Directory browser** — Browse your remote filesystem and pick a working directory per thread - **Dark & light mode** — Full native iOS theming with semantic colors - **Swipe actions** — Swipe to delete or duplicate conversations - **Message queuing** — Queue a message while the AI is busy; it sends automatically when the run finishes --- ## Architecture Claw Code is a two-part system: ``` ┌──────────────┐ ┌──────────────────┐ ┌──────────────┐ │ Mobile App │──HTTP──>│ Express Gateway │──spawn─>│ Claw Binary │ │ (Expo/RN) │<─SSE────│ + SQLite │<─stdout─│ (Rust CLI) │ └──────────────┘ └──────────────────┘ └──────────────┘ ``` | Layer | Stack | |-------|-------| | **Mobile** | Expo SDK 54 · React Native 0.81 · Expo Router v6 · Zustand · Reanimated | | **Gateway** | Express.js · SQLite (better-sqlite3) · SSE streaming · Bearer token auth | | **Agent** | Claw binary (Rust) — spawned per run, stdout/stderr parsed as JSON | The gateway spawns a Claw process for each AI run, pipes its output back to the mobile app via Server-Sent Events, and persists everything in SQLite. --- ## Quick Start ### 1. Gateway ```bash cd backend yarn install GATEWAY_AUTH_TOKEN=dev-token yarn dev # → http://localhost:4000 ``` **Environment variables:** | Variable | Default | Description | |----------|---------|-------------| | `PORT` | `4000` | Server port | | `GATEWAY_AUTH_TOKEN` | `dev-token` | Bearer token for API auth | | `DATABASE_FILE` | — | SQLite file path (optional) | ### 2. Mobile ```bash yarn install yarn start ``` Then in **Settings** (gear icon): 1. Set **Server URL** — e.g. `http://localhost:4000` 2. Set **Bearer token** — match `GATEWAY_AUTH_TOKEN` 3. Tap **Test** to confirm `/health` responds --- ## Screens ### Chat List (`app/index.tsx`) Sorted by recent activity. Each row shows the thread title, working directory, message preview, and a live status indicator. Swipe left for delete/duplicate. ### Thread View (`app/thread/[id].tsx`) The main chat screen — message bubbles with markdown rendering, a **ThinkingIndicator** showing live tool steps, inline permission prompts, a terminal bottom-sheet, model picker in the header, and a directory badge. ### Settings (`app/settings.tsx`) VPS connection config and model queue management. Add models (Claude, OpenRouter, local), reorder them for fallback priority, toggle auto-compact and streaming. --- ## API Reference All routes require `Authorization: Bearer ` (except `/health`). | Method | Endpoint | Description | |--------|----------|-------------| | `GET` | `/health` | Health check | | `GET` | `/threads` | List all threads | | `POST` | `/threads` | Create a new thread | | `DELETE` | `/threads/:id` | Delete a thread | | `POST` | `/threads/:id/duplicate` | Duplicate a thread | | `PATCH` | `/threads/:id` | Update thread (e.g. workDir) | | `GET` | `/threads/:id/messages` | List messages | | `POST` | `/threads/:id/messages` | Send a message & trigger AI run | | `GET` | `/threads/:id/stream` | SSE stream (deltas, tool steps, terminal, status) | | `POST` | `/threads/:id/stop` | Stop a running AI run | | `POST` | `/threads/:id/permissions/:pid` | Approve/deny a permission request | | `GET` | `/threads/:id/terminal` | Get terminal output | | `POST` | `/threads/:id/terminal` | Send a terminal command | | `GET` | `/fs/browse` | Browse remote filesystem | ### SSE Event Types | Event | Payload | Description | |-------|---------|-------------| | `status` | `{ status }` | Thread status change (`idle`/`running`/`waiting`/`error`) | | `delta` | `{ messageId, chunk }` | Streaming text chunk | | `message_error` | `{ messageId, text }` | Error in assistant message | | `tool_start` | `{ id, tool, label, messageId }` | Agent started a tool | | `tool_end` | `{ id, error? }` | Tool finished (or errored) | | `permission_request` | `{ id, tool, description }` | Agent needs user approval | | `terminal` | `{ chunk }` | Terminal output chunk | | `done` | — | Run completed | | `error` | — | Run errored out | --- ## Project Structure ``` ├── app/ # Expo Router screens │ ├── _layout.tsx # Root layout (providers, theme) │ ├── index.tsx # Chat list │ ├── settings.tsx # VPS connection + model queue │ ├── thread/[id].tsx # Thread/chat view │ └── theme.ts # (legacy — prefer constants/theme.ts) ├── components/ │ ├── SlashCommandPicker.tsx # /compact, /ls, /diff, etc. │ ├── DirectoryBrowser.tsx # Remote filesystem browser │ ├── animated-logo.tsx # Animated app logo │ ├── chat-container.tsx # Chat wrapper │ ├── chat-toolbar.tsx # Legacy toolbar │ ├── assistant-message.tsx # Assistant bubble renderer │ ├── user-message.tsx # User bubble renderer │ └── ui/ # Shared UI primitives ├── constants/ │ └── theme.ts # Design tokens (radius, spacing, shadow, typography) ├── store/ │ └── gatewayStore.ts # Zustand store (state, SSE client, all actions) ├── backend/ │ └── src/ │ ├── app.ts # Express app setup │ ├── server.ts # HTTP server entry │ ├── db/ │ │ ├── schema.ts # SQLite migrations │ │ └── sqlite.ts # DB connection │ ├── routes/ # Express routers │ │ ├── threads.ts │ │ ├── messages.ts │ │ ├── stream.ts │ │ ├── terminal.ts │ │ ├── fs.ts │ │ ├── openApp.ts │ │ └── health.ts │ ├── services/ # Business logic │ │ ├── threadService.ts │ │ ├── messageService.ts │ │ ├── runService.ts │ │ ├── streamService.ts │ │ └── terminalService.ts │ ├── runtime/ │ │ └── clawRuntime.ts # Claw binary adapter (swap for RunPod) │ ├── middleware/ │ │ └── auth.ts # Bearer token auth │ ├── config/ │ │ └── env.ts # Environment config │ └── types/ │ └── domain.ts # Shared domain types └── assets/ # Icons, images, splash ``` --- ## Design System All UI tokens live in `constants/theme.ts`: | Token | Values | |-------|--------| | `BORDER_RADIUS` | `xs` 4 · `sm` 8 · `md` 12 · `lg` 18 · `xl` 24 · `full` 9999 | | `SPACING` | `xs` 4 · `sm` 8 · `md` 12 · `lg` 16 · `xl` 24 | | `SHADOW` | `sm` · `md` · `lg` (iOS shadow props + elevation) | | `TYPOGRAPHY` | Font sizes 12–20, line heights 16–30 | Colors come from `@bacons/apple-colors` — semantic iOS colors that automatically adapt to dark/light mode. --- ## Runtime Adapter The gateway ships with a stubbed `clawRuntime` that simulates AI deltas and terminal output. Swap it for a real Claw binary or RunPod-backed adapter while keeping the API surface unchanged. --- ## License 0BSD ","path":"/home/runner/workspace/README.md"}
blocks.name: write_file

blocks.output:
{ "type": "update", "filePath": "/home/runner/workspace/README.md", "content": "# Claw Code Mobile\n\n
\n\n**AI coding agent in your pocket.**\n\nChat with an AI that can execute code, edit files, and manage projects on your remote VPS — all from your iPhone.\n\n
\n\n---\n\n## Features\n\n- **Streaming chat** — Watch AI responses appear word-by-word in real-time\n- **Live tool tracking** — See every action the agent takes as it works (file edits, terminal commands, searches)\n- **Permission prompts** — Approve or deny dangerous operations inline before the agent proceeds\n- **Terminal drawer** — Pull-up bottom sheet with live terminal output and command input\n- **Model queue with fallback** — Configure multiple AI models (Claude, OpenRouter, local) that auto-fallback if one fails\n- **Auto-compact** — Automatically summarizes conversation context when the window fills up\n- **Directory browser** — Browse your remote filesystem and pick a working directory per thread\n- **Dark & light mode** — Full native iOS theming with semantic colors\n- **Swipe actions** — Swipe to delete or duplicate conversations\n- **Message queuing** — Queue a message while the AI is busy; it sends automatically when the run finishes\n\n---\n\n## Architecture\n\nClaw Code is a two-part system:\n\n```\n┌──────────────┐ ┌──────────────────┐ ┌──────────────┐\n│ Mobile App │──HTTP──>│ Express Gateway │──spawn─>│ Claw Binary │\n│ (Expo/RN) │<─SSE────│ + SQLite │<─stdout─│ (Rust CLI) │\n└──────────────┘ └──────────────────┘ └──────────────┘\n```\n\n| Layer | Stack |\n|-------|-------|\n| **Mobile** | Expo SDK 54 · React Native 0.81 · Expo Router v6 · Zustand · Reanimated |\n| **Gateway** | Express.js · SQLite (better-sqlite3) · SSE streaming · Bearer token auth |\n| **Agent** | Claw binary (Rust) — spawned per run, stdout/stderr parsed as JSON |\n\nThe gateway spawns a Claw process for each AI run, pipes its output back to the mobile app via Server-Sent Events, and persists everything in SQLite.\n\n---\n\n## Quick Start\n\n### 1. Gateway\n\n```bash\ncd backend\nyarn install\nGATEWAY_AUTH_TOKEN=dev-token yarn dev\n# → http://localhost:4000\n```\n\n**Environment variables:**\n\n| Variable | Default | Description |\n|----------|---------|-------------|\n| `PORT` | `4000` | Server port |\n| `GATEWAY_AUTH_TOKEN` | `dev-token` | Bearer token for API auth |\n| `DATABASE_FILE` | — | SQLite file path (optional) |\n\n### 2. Mobile\n\n```bash\nyarn install\nyarn start\n```\n\nThen in **Settings** (gear icon):\n\n1. Set **Server URL** — e.g. `http://localhost:4000`\n2. Set **Bearer token** — match `GATEWAY_AUTH_TOKEN`\n3. Tap **Test** to confirm `/health` responds\n\n---\n\n## Screens\n\n### Chat List (`app/index.tsx`)\nSorted by recent activity. Each row shows the thread title, working directory, message preview, and a live status indicator. Swipe left for delete/duplicate.\n\n### Thread View (`app/thread/[id].tsx`)\nThe main chat screen — message bubbles with markdown rendering, a **ThinkingIndicator** showing live tool steps, inline permission prompts, a terminal bottom-sheet, model picker in the header, and a directory badge.\n\n### Settings (`app/settings.tsx`)\nVPS connection config and model queue management. Add models (Claude, OpenRouter, local), reorder them for fallback priority, toggle auto-compact and streaming.\n\n---\n\n## API Reference\n\nAll routes require `Authorization: Bearer ` (except `/health`).\n\n| Method | Endpoint | Description |\n|--------|----------|-------------|\n| `GET` | `/health` | Health check |\n| `GET` | `/threads` | List all threads |\n| `POST` | `/threads` | Create a new thread |\n| `DELETE` | `/threads/:id` | Delete a thread |\n| `POST` | `/threads/:id/duplicate` | Duplicate a thread |\n| `PATCH` | `/threads/:id` | Update thread (e.g. workDir) |\n| `GET` | `/threads/:id/messages` | List messages |\n| `POST` | `/threads/:id/messages` | Send a message & trigger AI run |\n| `GET` | `/threads/:id/stream` | SSE stream (deltas, tool steps, terminal, status) |\n| `POST` | `/threads/:id/stop` | Stop a running AI run |\n| `POST` | `/threads/:id/permissions/:pid` | Approve/deny a permission request |\n| `GET` | `/threads/:id/terminal` | Get terminal output |\n| `POST` | `/threads/:id/terminal` | Send a terminal command |\n| `GET` | `/fs/browse` | Browse remote filesystem |\n\n### SSE Event Types\n\n| Event | Payload | Description |\n|-------|---------|-------------|\n| `status` | `{ status }` | Thread status change (`idle`/`running`/`waiting`/`error`) |\n| `delta` | `{ messageId, chunk }` | Streaming text chunk |\n| `message_error` | `{ messageId, text }` | Error in assistant message |\n| `tool_start` | `{ id, tool, label, messageId }` | Agent started a tool |\n| `tool_end` | `{ id, error? }` | Tool finished (or errored) |\n| `permission_request` | `{ id, tool, description }` | Agent needs user approval |\n| `terminal` | `{ chunk }` | Terminal output chunk |\n| `done` | — | Run completed |\n| `error` | — | Run errored out |\n\n---\n\n## Project Structure\n\n```\n├── app/ # Expo Router screens\n│ ├── _layout.tsx # Root layout (providers, theme)\n│ ├── index.tsx # Chat list\n│ ├── settings.tsx # VPS connection + model queue\n│ ├── thread/[id].tsx # Thread/chat view\n│ └── theme.ts # (legacy — prefer constants/theme.ts)\n├── components/\n│ ├── SlashCommandPicker.tsx # /compact, /ls, /diff, etc.\n│ ├── DirectoryBrowser.tsx # Remote filesystem browser\n│ ├── animated-logo.tsx # Animated app logo\n│ ├── chat-container.tsx # Chat wrapper\n│ ├── chat-toolbar.tsx # Legacy toolbar\n│ ├── assistant-message.tsx # Assistant bubble renderer\n│ ├── user-message.tsx # User bubble renderer\n│ └── ui/ # Shared UI primitives\n├── constants/\n│ └── theme.ts # Design tokens (radius, spacing, shadow, typography)\n├── store/\n│ └── gatewayStore.ts # Zustand store (state, SSE client, all actions)\n├── backend/\n│ └── src/\n│ ├── app.ts # Express app setup\n│ ├── server.ts # HTTP server entry\n│ ├── db/\n│ │ ├── schema.ts # SQLite migrations\n│ │ └── sqlite.ts # DB connection\n│ ├── routes/ # Express routers\n│ │ ├── threads.ts\n│ │ ├── messages.ts\n│ │ ├── stream.ts\n│ │ ├── terminal.ts\n│ │ ├── fs.ts\n│ │ ├── openApp.ts\n│ │ └── health.ts\n│ ├── services/ # Business logic\n│ │ ├── threadService.ts\n│ │ ├── messageService.ts\n│ │ ├── runService.ts\n│ │ ├── streamService.ts\n│ │ └── terminalService.ts\n│ ├── runtime/\n│ │ └── clawRuntime.ts # Claw binary adapter (swap for RunPod)\n│ ├── middleware/\n│ │ └── auth.ts # Bearer token auth\n│ ├── config/\n│ │ └── env.ts # Environment config\n│ └── types/\n│ └── domain.ts # Shared domain types\n└── assets/ # Icons, images, splash\n```\n\n---\n\n## Design System\n\nAll UI tokens live in `constants/theme.ts`:\n\n| Token | Values |\n|-------|--------|\n| `BORDER_RADIUS` | `xs` 4 · `sm` 8 · `md` 12 · `lg` 18 · `xl` 24 · `full` 9999 |\n| `SPACING` | `xs` 4 · `sm` 8 · `md` 12 · `lg` 16 · `xl` 24 |\n| `SHADOW` | `sm` · `md` · `lg` (iOS shadow props + elevation) |\n| `TYPOGRAPHY` | Font sizes 12–20, line heights 16–30 |\n\nColors come from `@bacons/apple-colors` — semantic iOS colors that automatically adapt to dark/light mode.\n\n---\n\n## Runtime Adapter\n\nThe gateway ships with a stubbed `clawRuntime` that simulates AI deltas and terminal output. Swap it for a real Claw binary or RunPod-backed adapter while keeping the API surface unchanged.\n\n---\n\n## License\n\n0BSD\n", "structuredPatch": [ { "oldStart": 1, "oldLines": 53, "newStart": 1, "newLines": 212, "lines": [ "-# Claw Code Mobile", "-", "-iPhone-first Expo app paired with a thin Node.js gateway for streaming chat with remote Claw sessions. The app mirrors ChatGPT/Claude UX with thread switching, streaming assistant bubbles, and an optional terminal drawer.\n\n## What's Inside\n- **Mobile:** Expo + TypeScript, Expo Router, Zustand state, bottom-sheet terminal, SSE-driven chat.\n- **Gateway:** Express + TypeScript, SQLite persistence, SSE streaming, bearer-token auth, stubbed Claw runtime ready to swap for RunPod.\n\n## Quick Start\n\n### 1) Gateway\n```bash\ncd backend\nyarn install\nGATEWAY_AUTH_TOKEN=dev-token yarn dev\n# defaults to http://localhost:4000\n```\n\nConfiguration (env):\n- `PORT` (default `4000`)\n- `GATEWAY_AUTH_TOKEN` (default `dev-token`)\n- `DATABASE_FILE` (optional sqlite file path)\n\n### 2) Mobile\n```bash\nyarn install\nEXPO_PUBLIC_GATEWAY_URL=http://localhost:4000 # optional helper\nyarn start\n```\n\nIn **Settings** (gear icon):\n- Set **Server URL** (e.g. `http://localhost:4000`)\n- Set **Bearer token** (match `GATEWAY_AUTH_TOKEN`)\n- Tap **Test** to confirm `/health` responds.\n\n## Product Notes\n- Thread list shows status pill, repo, preview, and updated time.\n- Chat screen streams assistant output into one bubble, shows run status, stop button, and opens a terminal bottom sheet.\n- Terminal drawer streams live chunks and accepts manual commands.\n- State is persisted client-side for server URL/token; everything else streams from the gateway.\n\n## API Snapshot\n- `GET /health`\n- `GET /threads` / `POST /threads`\n- `GET /threads/:id/messages` / `POST /threads/:id/messages`\n- `GET /threads/:id/stream` (SSE: status | delta | terminal | done | error)\n- `POST /threads/:id/stop`\n- `GET /threads/:id/terminal` / `POST /threads/:id/terminal`\n\nAuth: `Authorization: Bearer ` on all routes except `/health`.\n\n## Runtime Adapter\nThe gateway ships with a stubbed `clawRuntime` that simulates deltas and terminal output. Swap it for a RunPod-backed adapter to connect to real Claw sessions while keeping the API surface unchanged.\n", "gitDiff": null }

blocks.text:
Done! The README went from ~53 lines to a full ~212-line document. Here's what's new:

- **Tagline & centered header** — "AI coding agent in your pocket"
- **Features section** — 10 bullet points covering streaming, tool tracking, permissions, terminal, model queue, auto-compact, directory browser, dark mode, swipe actions, message queuing
- **Architecture diagram** — ASCII flow showing Mobile ↔ Gateway ↔ Claw Binary
- **Stack table** — per-layer tech breakdown
- **Environment variables table** — cleaner than the old list
- **Screens section** — describes each screen with file references
- **Full API reference** — 14 endpoints in a table (was 6 in a flat list), plus the complete SSE event type reference
- **Project structure tree** — every directory and key file annotated
- **Design system section** — tokens table with values
